steps.title: Attach each cost to its variable
steps.content: A 10-ride pass costs $13.50$, and $g$ is the number of 10-ride passes, so that cost is $13.50g$. A single-ride pass costs $1.75$, and $t$ is the number of single-ride passes, so that cost is $1.75t$.

steps.title: Set the monthly total
steps.content:
Riley spends $90$ total, so the pass costs must add to $90$:
$$13.50g+1.75t=90$$
The answer is D.
